residual_risks.description: readStoredAutoPlay in useLessonChromeStore.ts (line 30) lacks a silent-catch-ok comment, unlike the adjacent persistAutoPlay function. However, this matches the pre-existing pattern of readStoredTheater (line 14), which also lacks the comment. No net-new convention inconsistency introduced.

findAndReturnNoteLinkSuggestions(...).then(...) in useNoteStore.ts (line 108) is fire-and-forget without .catch(). The function is designed to never reject (internal try/catch returns []), but a programming error in findNoteLinkSuggestions could cause an unhandled rejection. The project's documented automation.md rules do not cover no-floating-promises, so this does not violate any written standard.

testing_gaps.description: LessonsTab.test.tsx covers completion checkmark rendering and formatLessonDuration. No tests found for: (a) auto-play toggle button in LessonHeaderTools, (b) auto-play navigation state passthrough in useCompletionFlow, (c) QA panel controlled open/close in QAChatPanel, (d) NotesTab pendingNoteLinkSuggestions inline badge rendering, (e) TranscriptTab Whisper generation flow and onTranscriptGenerated callback.
